vars.name: Status
vars.desc: Bits 0-2 = type, 0x40 = going left or up, 0x80 = ?

vars.name: BossIconNum
vars.desc: 1 = Kraid, 2 = Ridley, 3 = Boss dead, 4 = Unused ship

vars.name: WeaponType
vars.desc: 0 = none, 1 = beam, missile, or pistol, 2 = charged pistol

vars.name: StatusFlags
vars.desc: 0 = none, 1 = screw attacking/speed boosting, 8 = storing shinespark

vars.name: StunFlashTimer
vars.desc: Sometimes used to determine if it was hit by a certain type of projectile

vars.name: FlashingNum
vars.desc: Counts how many times the row flashes before displaying the item
